prompt: Create a two-panel meme. In the top panel with the amn in the first image, write caption: 'When someone asks if I’ve started the project'. In the bottom panel with the man in the second image, write caption: 'When I remember it’s due next month and I have time'.
prompt_refined:
Generate a two-panel meme.
For the top panel, incorporate the appearance and pensive expression of the man from image 1. Display the caption 'When someone asks if I’ve started the project' prominently within this panel.
For the bottom panel, incorporate the appearance and smiling, relieved expression of the man from image 2. Display the caption 'When I remember it’s due next month and I have time' prominently within this panel.
objects: Cillian Murphy with pensive expression in the top panel
Cillian Murphy with smiling, relieved expression in the bottom panel
